steps.title: Identify the three angles in the right triangle
steps.content: The triangle has a right angle at the bottom left (90°), an angle of 13° at the top, and an unknown angle $a$ at the bottom right.

steps.title: Apply the triangle angle sum theorem
steps.content:
All angles in a triangle sum to 180°:

$$90° + 13° + a = 180°$$

Solving for $a$:
$$a = 180° - 90° - 13° = 77°$$

That matches choice B — B is correct.
